notes: Re-tested VAL-CONTRACT-002 after fix feature 'lifecycle-normalize-read-serialization-paths' was completed. The fix successfully normalized all read paths (CLI JSON, CLI human-readable, HTTP API, hydrate, ready list, dashboard) so that deprecated 'awaiting_attestation' state is always shown as canonical 'checking' state in user-facing output. Database still contains legacy 'awaiting_attestation' values for backward compatibility, but normalization-on-read ensures they never leak into runtime output.
